title: Create: Automated Defense Systems
description: A modpack that has plenty of techy mods to help you make automated defenses for any base.
body:
This modpack's purpose is to add mods useful for vanilla, base defense, and the likes. It contains mods like Create, AE2, Create: Big Cannons, CBC Radars, the likes. It also contains many optimization mods, as well.
It's useful for making secure bases, or for servers, or playing with your friends, as well.
A reminder; I personally curate every modpack I make, with the user in mind. Because i play them too.
